title: pedicularis lutescens subsp. tongtchuanensis
intro: Pedicularis lutescens subsp. tongtchuanensis, also known as Tongtchuan Pedicularis, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Pedicularis genus, commonly found in the mountainous regions of China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant compounds, which contribute to its health benefits. The health benefits of Tongtchuan Pedicularis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and improve digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional Chinese medicine. Tongtchuan Pedicularis can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
